response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project work via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and his recent roles focus on TypeScript/Node.js and AI tooling rather than low-latency navigation systems or distributed map tiling.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage by NGOs
Demonstrated deep systems-level experience with DLang, asynchronous I/O, and low-latency services
Strong track record of learning new technologies and contributing across full stack
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing or navigation systems
Recent roles emphasize web/TS stacks, not geospatial data pipelines or tile optimization
Career gap and lack of recent exposure to core required technologies (C++, distributed systems for routing)
